title: Opening for Production Engineer at Exide Industries

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Exide Industries
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Production Engineer looking for your next big career move? Exide Industries in Chennai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Exide Industries:
Exide Industries is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Exide Industries!
